description_long: This is a tall, curvaceous glass bottle filled with a yellowish juice, sealed with a matching screw cap. The front label displays the brand 'EASY MOUZIO' and the product name 'pineapple nectar', accompanied by a vivid illustration of two pineapples. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, with a gradient green and yellow background on the label. Nutritional information and product details are printed on the back and sides of the label, wrapping around the bottle. The cap is decorated with a similar color scheme and branding, and the bottle appears to be filled almost to the top with juice.
description: A tall, glossy glass bottle of yellow pineapple nectar with a screw cap and colorful branding, featuring a pineapple illustration on the front.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle shows the nutritional information panel and product details on a green and yellow label.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the label's gradient design and a partial view of the nutritional panel.
description_view_2: The front view displays the 'EASY MOUZIO' brand, 'pineapple nectar' text, and a vivid pineapple illustration.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side of the label, including the volume marking (250 ml) and partial product details.
